body_txt: A horror trope which has become something of a Dead Horse Trope , as it's now almost always played for comedy. It involves a character seeing an ugly face and begin pulling at it, on the assumption that it's a mask. Of course, it's actually someone's face and the puller will typically be Horror Struck . Sometimes a purely comedic variation will occur with wigs if the joke is that a woman looks like a man . Also closely related to "I'm not pregnant, I'm just obese" jokes. Compare with Your Costume Needs Work , For Halloween, I Am Going as Myself , Mistaken for Fake Hair and Not a Zombie . Can be a result of the monster being Mistaken for an Imposter .
